summary: Improve first-run `kb` UX: make `describe module` useful by default, add `describe fact`, and make `list facts` discoverable without knowing the type.
decisions: Default `kb describe module` to include `card`, `entrypoints`, `edit_points`, and `related_facts` (and add `--include all`) to avoid help-roundtrips.
Add `kb describe fact --id <FACT_ID>` for exact fact lookup; change `kb list facts` to allow optional `--type` and return summaries (id/type/tags) for low-churn discovery.
pitfalls: Facts can grow large; keep `kb list facts` as summaries and fetch full records via `kb describe fact` or `kb pack` when needed.
When updating docs/recipes, prefer copy/pasteable one-liners that do not require `--help` calls to discover include flags.
